# UC-17.6.4 · Akamai Guardicore Agent Installation Coverage vs Expected Assets (`guardicore:agent`)

## Description

Uninstrumented VMs break microsegmentation guarantees.

## Value

Infrastructure teams close coverage gaps before pentests find them.

## Implementation

Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

## SPL

```spl
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:agent" earliest=-4h
| stats dc(hostname) as covered by datacenter
| lookup expected_assets.csv datacenter OUTPUT expected
| eval gap=expected-covered
| where gap>0
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (gap), table.

## References

- [Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/7426)
- [Akamai Guardicore documentation](https://www.akamai.com/products/guardicore)
